## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run verify` locally (or the equivalent scripts: `check`, `test`, `typecheck`, `lint`) and it passes.
- [ ] I updated documentation/README where relevant.
- [ ] I did not bump `package.json`/`package-lock.json` version unless this PR is a release-prep PR.
- [ ] This PR does not include unrelated/reformatted files.
